acceptance_criteria: Filter UI allows selecting one or more `type` values
Filter UI allows selecting `min_risk` and `max_risk` numeric range
API supports `GET /events?type=&min_risk=&max_risk=` and returns events matching filters
API returns empty array `[]` when no events match
Invalid query params return HTTP 400 with JSON error
UI shows `No events` state with no console errors when dataset empty or fields missing
Risk bands are as specified and used by AI mapping
